Package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

Class Candidate.CandidateBuilder

  • java.lang.Object

    • Method Detail

      • withContent

        public Candidate.CandidateBuilder withContent​(Content content)
        Output only. Generated content returned from the model.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withFinishReason

        public Candidate.CandidateBuilder withFinishReason​(FinishReasonEnum finishReason)
        Optional. Output only. The reason why the model stopped generating tokens.

        If empty, the model has not stopped generating the tokens.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withSafetyRatings

        public Candidate.CandidateBuilder withSafetyRatings​(List<SafetyRating> safetyRatings)
        List of ratings for the safety of a response candidate.

        There is at most one rating per category.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withCitationMetadata

        public Candidate.CandidateBuilder withCitationMetadata​(CitationMetadata citationMetadata)
        Output only. Citation information for a model-generated candidate.

        This field may be populated with recitation information for any text included in the content. These are passages that are "recited" from copyrighted material in the foundational LLM's training data.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withTokenCount

        public Candidate.CandidateBuilder withTokenCount​(Integer tokenCount)
        Output only. Token count for this candidate.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withGroundingAttributions

        public Candidate.CandidateBuilder withGroundingAttributions​(List<GroundingAttribution> groundingAttributions)
        Output only. Attribution information for sources that contributed to a grounded answer.

        This field is populated for GenerateAnswer calls.

        Returns:
        this.

      • withIndex

        public Candidate.CandidateBuilder withIndex​(Integer index)
        Output only. Index of the candidate in the list of candidates.
        Returns:
        this.

      • build

        public Candidate build()

      • toString

        public String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class Object
